category_sources: Official GitHub README describes ncspot as a Spotify client.
source_facts.description says it is a cross-platform ncurses Spotify client.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub repository name is ncspot.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage points to the official GitHub repository, whose README is the official documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/hrkfdn/ncspot, so repo is intentionally not re-determined.
tags_sources: Official README describes the terminal Spotify client behavior.
source_facts.description identifies Spotify, ncurses, and Rust.
